intro: Between April 8 and April 20, 2026, ZCyberNews published 22 articles tagged with AI. The threat actor Pushpaganda was the most frequently covered. The reporting detailed a range of incidents, with nine informational alerts, nine high-severity reports, three medium-severity items, and one critical bulletin. These events primarily impacted the critical_infrastructure, finance, government, manufacturing, and technology sectors. Geographically, the affected regions included the United states, Asia, Australia, Canada, and Japan.
